summary:
DOMESTIC CRISES AND RIOTS: Brandon details visions of the government terminating entitlements such as food stamps, WIC, and Social Security, leading to massive public outrage and mass chaos. Brandon describes widespread rioting, looting in wealthy neighborhoods, and the implementation of martial law in cities like Chicago and Detroit. Brandon states these riots are orchestrated by paid instigators funded by an individual collaborating with the devil to destabilize the nation. Furthermore, Brandon clarifies that these visions involve people of all races and are not racially motivated. Brandon warns of a Red Dawn scenario where domestic riots serve as a decoy for terrorist attacks, including buildings rigged with explosives to target first responders.

POLITICAL PLOTS AND TARGETED INDIVIDUALS: Brandon outlines ongoing spiritual and physical threats against political figures, specifically detailing attempts to derail Donald Trump's presidency and health. Brandon notes that witchcraft and the occult are being used to cause medical issues like blood clots and strokes to disqualify Trump from office. Brandon also mentions that Eric Trump and Donald Trump Jr. will experience multiplied financial success through investments, requiring discernment to avoid those who wish to steal their wealth. Additionally, Brandon calls for prayer for Pam Bondi to expose corruption, and states that Alex Jones will survive an attempt on his life, leading to a near-death experience that will make him a louder, radical voice. Alternative media figures like Tucker Carlson and Joe Rogan are also mentioned as individuals needing prayer.

ECONOMIC INSTABILITY AND CURRENCY SHIFTS: Brandon discusses an impending economic shift characterized by a severe dollar collapse and a transition to a digital currency system. Brandon shares a vision of a pig wearing lipstick paraded by Donald Trump, symbolizing an economy that appears healthy but is fundamentally flawed, alongside a transparent housing market. Brandon explicitly mentions a massive national debt leading to a debt jubilee where banks seize assets overnight. Brandon foresees the American dollar losing half its value, represented by a torn dollar bill and an American flag turning digital. According to Brandon, these financial crises will drastically alter class structures, turning the middle class into the new poor and resulting in widespread tent cities. Brandon also highlights immediate concerns regarding a government shutdown affecting the payment of federal workers and the military.

GLOBAL CONFLICTS AND SPIRITUAL WARFARE: Brandon recounts a vision of Satan gathering with six principalities around a battle table to strategize the destabilization of all seven continents and the introduction of a Beast system. Brandon mentions international concerns, including the need to pray for Taiwan's protection from China, the exposure of unaccountable funds and biolabs in Ukraine, and the disruption of a Category 5 hurricane hitting Jamaica. In the political realm, Brandon describes a late-night scenario where a small group of seven politicians faces intense blackmail and external pressure regarding a crucial budget vote, requiring intervention to prevent further national instability.

FUTURE ANOMALIES AND APOCALYPTIC VISIONS: Brandon states that the future holds major deceptions reminiscent of the days of Noah, including appearances of fallen angels, Draconian entities, and lizard people. Brandon asserts that ancient temple walls and indigenous cave paintings were attempts to communicate the existence of these giants and bird-like beings. Finally, Brandon shares a detailed vision set in New York's Times Square on New Year's Eve in 2026. While John Lennon's song Imagine plays and two men speak on CNN, Brandon observes a massive, teardrop-shaped yellow flash of light accompanied by the sound of screaming crowds, signaling an abrupt apocalyptic event.
rawData: [October 29, 2025]-[Praying over riots]-[https://youtu.be/TeakZx4yRog]-[Good evening or afternoon, family, wherever you are. I want to say a few things before we pray. Many of you don't realize that I go live every day. People are asking, "Brandon, why aren't you making videos anymore?" I tell them I make videos all the time—they're just live. However, we're finding that if you don't upload a regular video, it doesn't appear in people's feeds because of the algorithm. From what we understand, the lives are treated differently than the original uploads. So, we're going to start uploading the lives as regular videos again. We've been doing this since Charlie Kirk's passing. Diana mentioned that many people are saying I'm not making videos anymore, so we're going to do something different. For those of you who watch the lives, you might think it's a new video, but it's actually the live video going into a different feed. I'm doing this for the algorithm. I thought it was interesting because so many people said they missed me and asked why I stopped making videos. Many elderly viewers don't realize you have to click the "Live" button to see those videos. So, all those videos will go into the regular feed now. I have a friend here who wants to join us. Come on in; you look comfy. You have to come into my forest—we're in the woods together now. I want to talk about what I saw regarding the rioting and the things the Lord showed me back in 2024. We've been praying over it for a long time. I told Braden I wanted to bring up all the videos where I talked about entitlements and the rioting. I saw the government turning off all the entitlements: food stamps, WIC, food, benefits, and even Social Security. I saw a point in time where even medical benefits would be turned off, leading to a major outrage. There was a major outrage concerning people not getting their entitlements, and they were rioting. As I've said many times, people were throwing things through windows and stealing. It was mass chaos, and the President had to bring in armored cars and Hummers to set up fencing and close things off. They called for martial law in the cities because buildings were being ransacked. It was bad in Chicago, Detroit, and all throughout the East. For a period of time, people acted like it was a free-for-all. They started robbing the rich, going into wealthy neighborhoods and stealing like Robin Hood, with a mentality of "f--- the rich." It's the truth; that's how everyone was acting because they were upset about not getting their money. Many people said I was racist because of the things I was saying. That really hurt. Of all the people in the world, I am not a racist person. It really grieved me because some "sisters of color" said, "You're a racist, Brandon; you're coming against us." I said, "No, not at all." If I ever come across as racist, I've told my wife to just slap the snot out of me. I'm telling you, that aggrieved me, and I want to make that clear. This has nothing to do with race. I'm telling you exactly what I see through the prophetic lens. Whatever color skin you have, it's irrelevant to me. I could care less. It's about what the Holy Spirit said and what I saw in a glimpse of the future. I never want to come across as racist. I've been attacked and called names, but I'm not looking for sympathy. I just want you to know that all people—Hispanic, Latino, African-American, Asian—are welcome on this channel. Having white skin means nothing. I want you to know that we love you and we are a family. I don't look at skin color; we are the family of God. I hope that always comes from my heart. I love everybody. Whether it was an attack from the enemy or whatever, I wanted to make that very clear. When I'm telling you what the Holy Spirit is showing me, I saw many people of color in these visions, but I wasn't saying it was only them—there were white people, too. It didn't matter about color. I brought up BLM and Martin Luther King Jr. to relate the scale of the hundreds of thousands of people protesting, like Antifa or other recent events. I obviously need to learn how to communicate better. After this happened, I saw great distress in our cities. I saw fires throughout New York and buildings burning down. The riots were so bad in New York that people were taking their families and leaving the cities for the South to get away from the craziness. It was a way to destabilize things. I've told you many times: the very freedoms you take for granted every day—the security and safety you feel going to the movies, sporting events, or church—will be challenged in the days ahead. And I saw a man that had a meeting with the devil that would fund it to have paid rioters, paid people to bring greater instability into our country so that it would bring civil unrest. As this happened, I saw an attack against the Second Amendment where they would try to confiscate arms because it was one of the dominoes that had to be removed before they could bring in a One World Order; America had to be disarmed. And the only way I saw it was mass chaos with mass shootings trying to make instability by certain individuals with a lot of money. George, I want you to understand that what I have seen coming was to challenge you to say, 'Is it safe for us to go to the movie today? Is it safe for us to go to church today?' You would question, 'Is it safe to go to the grocery store today?' because there's a lot of craziness going on. And as I saw these things, it was by design and on purpose. And that's why the Lord said, 'Pray, because there's a plan to try to derail Donald Trump's presidency in a greater way because what he's trying to do will be successful.' The Lord showed us and we had a window to ride the waves. But as I saw the enemy—remember yesterday he was again at the battle table with six major principalities around him and they were strategizing on this big table. Now I know it's a metaphor, probably. I don't think the devil has a table and he's up there doing this, but it's symbolic that this is really something that's happening in the spirit: these six principalities over all these different continents—it's seven continents, right? Seven. So they were all over the areas, is what I'm trying to say, to try to bring instability to these nations—Asia, the continents, Africa. So in all seven, but with him, he would be seven. Six plus him is seven. So all of them together were strategizing to bring instability to the nations. 'How do we do this?' And he was strategizing. And what we saw last night in the spirit—what the Lord showed me—was He said every plan he has, every strategy he has, he can't see the future. Satan can't see the future, but the Lord God Jehovah can. And every plot, every plan, every pursuit he has against us, He said, 'What the devil meant for bad, I'm going to turn it around for good.' Brandon, if you pray—if my people pray, if my people who are called by my name will humble themselves and pray. So that's what we do. But I saw him and he was furious. He was hitting that stick against the map—and I don't know what that map was, but there was some kind of piece of paper on this—and he was smacking it down talking to all these demons with huge horns and scales. I could see him behind the table and he was hitting that table. He was fierce. He was furious, angry about wanting to derail. He doesn't want a revival; he wants mass chaos. Why? Because this will bring in the social unrest to bring in the Beast system. So that's what we were seeing last night and the Lord warned us. I talked to a man today and he said his wife worked in the government and they're already planning for no food on the first. They said there's a 99% chance we will not have food stamps or anything on the first. He said they already know it's not going to happen. And he told me, 'My wife's big in the government and she's over in this area.' And she goes—he said—'Honey, you need to go, we need to go get food.' This is what he told me today. He said, 'We need to go get food now.' That's what he said he was doing, and I looked at him and went, 'That's interesting.' And this man isn't born again. He said, 'We're going to go get food because we already know what's coming.' And I said, 'Wow.' But this is what we knew clear back in 2024, April 3rd or whatever it was. I had the video Braden was talking about and I've talked about it ever since April 7th. On April 7th, I had this vision of 2024. So well over a year we've been getting this warning about what looks like it will be Saturday. But every single one of these TikToks is saying, 'When do we riot on Saturday? We're going to go and start taking food from Walmart and we're going to do all this. We're going to pillage.' And this is what I saw. So I'm not trying to scare you; I'm trying to prepare you. But this is what the Holy Spirit tells us we should pray to deescalate rioting and chaos and burning of the cities. I saw, like I said, I've told you how many times that I saw New York burning, not just a little bit. We're talking fires everywhere. And this goes with David Wilkerson's vision that he had back in 1995 or so, '94—long time ago—warning the people that he saw New York on fire and mass chaos. So, what will this do? Will this bring in the dollar collapse? Will that do all that? Well, that's what they plan: civil unrest. But this is what I'm praying about today. I want you to pay very close attention. As this civil unrest—if this takes off like what I've seen, we can stop it. I see in part here. Listen, as the civil unrest happens—the Red Dawn experience—as the chaos is going over here, we have terrorists in our country. A Red Dawn experience—you understand? Red Dawn. We have the enemy within, the Trojan horse within. As they're acting nuts over here—civil unrest—what are they doing over here? This is what we need to be praying about. Remember when I said I saw the buildings with these trip wires and the firefighters going in there? They ran into the buildings and as the buildings were on fire in these certain cities, the firefighters would run up to try to put out the fires and get everything going, but there were trip wires with explosives and they were set up. But this was not the main thing; this was a decoy to what was going to happen over here. And the Lord said, 'You must pray for what's about to happen over here as well as here.' I know he is trying to defuse it and everything—which rightfully so we want him to because we don't want them trying to replace him. We don't need to have any kind of excuse to say, 'Hey, he's not qualified for the job anymore because of his health.' That's exactly what they would want. 'Well, you know, he doesn't look like he's physically fit anymore; he's having all these issues.' Any avenue, everything they would try to come against this man, they have tried. So, we know by the spirit of God what the Holy Spirit has told us. We're to pray for his heart, his veins, his brain for aneurysms, for whatever this is. Remember I saw the White House and as I saw the lights were on in the White House, there was a major storm brewing outside and all the tree limbs were on the front yard lawn. I saw mass chaos going on outside, but the Lord said, 'Pay attention. The lights are still on. Pay attention. The lights are still on. Pray for your president.' And I saw a massive hurricane—looked like a demonic cloud turning above the White House. It looked like a hurricane and it was blowing and the winds were blowing, but there was still light on in the White House because the people were praying. And the Lord said, 'This is witchcraft. This is the occult coming against him.' And we pray for President Trump's health. We pray for his heart. We pray for his legs and the circulation. The Lord specifically brought up blood clots to dissolve and go away. No blood clots, no clogged arteries, no whatever. And the MRI would have picked up all that. Strokes, high blood pressure, whatever for his body. And so the other part what we saw last night going over this is Eric Trump. We saw that God said, "I'm bringing double for the trouble" because Donald Trump didn't have to run for president and do what God had put on his heart to do. He didn't have to. He's old; he can retire and go on about his business. He was president once and he could say, "Listen, I'm going to go play golf for the rest of my life at Mar-a-Lago, go out there and have a glass of tea and enjoy life." But he put himself in there at almost 80 years old. It's time to retire at his age; he's a multi-billionaire. He can do whatever he wants. But God put it in his heart to do what he did. And the Lord said, "Because of this, I saw a great double then a triple on their finances for investments." This was concerning crypto and other things. And the Lord said, "Pray for Eric Trump and Don Jr. to have supernatural wisdom and discernment on who they're supposed to be talking to because there would be enemies trying to rob them of their blessing." So, that's what was the part of that yesterday that I'm bringing up again for the people who don't watch it. I had a two-and-a-half-hour video last night. I'll make this one shorter. I need rest. But I want to tell you all, those are the things we prayed to. There comes a time we're going to have to have our own thing, baby. They don't like what I say. You're persecuted for the word's sake. Regardless, I know God is able to do it. We're going to finish what he's called us to do. I pray it's working. You can look at the phone, hun, and see if it's working. Don't stress out, son. It's fine. It's back; the enemy is an idiot. You want me to do this one? Yeah, sure. It's going live. It's good. Okay, let's do this. If it starts doing that, Paisley, let us know. So, what was I saying? They're all saying it's good. So, we're talking about the rich. You're praying for the rich. Oh, yeah. Praying for the blessing. Because if you watch what the rich do, you get wisdom. You don't watch what the poor do; you watch what the rich do. That's why "The Art of the Deal" and those things—that's why I read these books, because they've done it; they've achieved it. You go, "How did you do it?" Well, you know, Brandon, you're all into the money. I didn't say that; it takes money to get the gospel out. People, I didn't realize how much it cost doing just everything when you push and you start doing things from Bibles to stuff. It ain't free. And people get all mad when you start talking about money. Turn it all off. Sorry. This is the end times and we're doing this. And I'm going to tell you this: God's hand is not short and he wants us to have wisdom. When I watch the Trumps and I watch what God has done with them, they are like watching the Greens, the people at Hobby Lobby and stuff; you watch people, you learn. I want to learn from people who have been there and done that. It's like learning from Billy Burke who's been in ministry for 50 years. How are you still in ministry after—I mean, longer than I've been alive? That's amazing. Don't you think that's amazing? And you're still going strong or Oral Roberts, you know. So, I don't know. What else was I going to say? We had a list. I don't want to ramble because you got sister clipboard that gets mad about it. I try to keep it on track. Do you remember what else we were going to talk about? Was that it, son? Last night you were praying over George—bad guy George. I don't think there was anything else. I think that was it. But did they have any questions? I can answer some questions real quick because that was pretty quick. 26 minutes? Boom. Kept it under an hour. Highlight rapid shot. There you go. Oh, they're asking me to put the mic on. Testing, one, two, three. I don't know if this is dead. Minnie Mouse, you got to talk louder. From what I see, I think it's dead. I wasn't saying anything important. Someone said it keeps cutting out. The audio is cutting in and out. But the video is crystal clear. The audio is cutting out because I'm on live and it does that when I say certain things. Okay. So if I say certain things on their platform, your mic is muted; it's like a warning before you disappear. People are saying audio is fine. All right. Well, praise God. Your audio is good. Some people are saying not, but some people are saying it's fine. I can't restart it. It looks like most are saying it's good. Well, we just have to go with it. Like I said, I'm on their platform. I watch what I say. But I'm going to tell you this: whenever I've seen other YouTubers, I understand because they say they can't say certain things. You have to watch what you say. It's just real. But okay. So we pray for Pam today for her protection. We pray because we know the underground chatter is bigger than what was caught. This was just fruit; it wasn't the root. What was said about that woman—what I've told you the Lord said, "Brandon, this is the fruit, not the root." We've got to go for the root because of the uncovering from Alex Jones. Praying over Alex Jones. Well, you say, "Why would you?" Because I believe he's a patriot; he's trying to help us. We pray for him because the Lord said they're going to try to hurt that man. But as I saw it, the Lord said, "I will spare his life and he'll become a more of a radical voice for me in the days ahead." Do you remember what the Lord said? "I will spare his life, Alex, and he will become a louder voice for me in the outcome of this." There would be an attempt, and at this attempt, he would be spared and he would become a louder voice, radically born again. A near-death experience would shake to awake Alex Jones is what I saw in the spirit. All I know is that the Lord said his hand was on him. The Lord said, "My hand is on Alex Jones." That's what he said. And he'll become a loud voice, even louder than what he is right now. And the Lord said, "Pray for alternative media" like Tucker, him, and other people like Joe Rogan, praying for these men to have a radical experience with the Father because God said, "My hand especially was on Alex Jones." He said that he's like a bulldog, and because of this, I saw him like a warrior, like a big grizzly bear. And that's not funny; it's actually very serious. Then I saw—I don't know what's going on in Jamaica. I haven't had time to look, but I'm sure we're praying for Jamaica. We pray for the people. I saw a lot of casualties and it looked like a war zone went through that place. I don't know what it looks like tonight, but we pray for the people of Jamaica. Praying over pro-Trump, praying over this holiday season. The enemy is such an idiot. It's right down at the fourth quarter, all about the end of the year. And it's a time frame when the Lord said this would be the beginning of the Fed lowering rates and doing things. And I saw the housing market; it was being taken like this and it was green, and I saw it was transparent houses. You remember that, the transparent houses? It wasn't solid. But then I saw President Trump walking a pig with lipstick, parading a pig with lipstick on, and the pig was walking around and it was so proud and it was shaking its little pig butt and it had a little curly tail and it was like it was the cat's meow. You know, that little pig was like, 'Woo, I'm out here. I'm walking.' And Trump had his head up and he was just walking that pig. But the pig was still a pig even with the lipstick on. That means the economy was still not good. Even if it still looked like that, it had lipstick on. It's a season. And I saw the markets and the housing and all that. And it was transparent. It wasn't solid no matter how it looked. And the Lord said, 'I'm giving you a window.' So here we have them saying, 'Well, we're not going to approve a budget. We have all these people not getting paid, the flights. How many of you want to show up for work, working all day long, hard, stressful job, landing airplanes at the FAA, and not get a check after you work your tail end off all day long?' So they want to shut down air travel. Do you understand? And then they said, 'Do most people understand that the Republicans don't have the majority in the Senate? That they don't have control over it for this budget? This is not their fault.' People go, 'Well, it's President Trump.' Well, I tell you what, it's not President Trump's fault. They even said, 'We want to pass a $1 trillion budget bill and have all this pork in it.' And they're saying, 'No, we got to stop this. Our country is going down. Our Titanic is going down. The dollar is done. I've already told you there's no saving it. What's coming back is Jesus. America is not coming back. I want you to hear me. People get mad at me for that, but I've seen into it. What's coming back is Jesus, and they're getting ready for the Beast system. The dollar's done. It's a TKO. We're 40 trillion in the hole. Well, we're going to pare it back with the tariffs. We're going to do all this stuff. It's short-lived. The same people who want to have a trillion dollar budget bill and all this stuff, they want to keep sinking the ship, not turn it around because they realize this thing is done. We're going to go to a digital platform, a digital currency. Everything's going digital. And I've already told you what happens after that. Remember what I told you? In the night when you're asleep, all the money in the banks—remember my first videos, I came on to warn you all—I said all the money in the banks is seized overnight, every bank, because everybody foreclosed on their houses; they couldn't pay, and the cars they couldn't pay. So they had a debt jubilee, people. What's that mean? I just saw that across the board they lumped it all into one thing, and it's like you filed bankruptcy as a nation. But we're going to reset the system with digital. And I saw an American flag and a dollar bill. And all of a sudden, it was worth 50 cents on the dollar. So, a $100 bill was worth 50 bucks and it was cut in half. And I saw the digital writing going all over and it started to go into like a crypto writing. And it was all digital. And half that flag started turning digital. And it went all electronic. People were lined up for food again. I saw all this. It happened. And they said, 'When did you see these things, Brandon? How come it hasn't happened yet? You see all this stuff and we're still waiting.' Thank God. I don't want my kids raised up in that. But as I see in part, I hear in part, I know the Lord is praying. And he said, 'Brandon, I'm giving you more time from October because my people prayed. You brought Trump in. I've given you a window of opportunity to change some things to get the wealth of the sinner laid up for the righteous. The church needs to get prepared for a great shaking that is going to awaken the church.' And I had the video and he said, 'You're not going to stop this. You're just going to delay it.' And as I was driving down the road—does anybody remember this?—I said, 'What we consider poor now will be middle class in the days ahead.' And I saw tent cities all around with tents everywhere with people not able to afford a home anymore. And there were people living like Skid Row. And the rich were still rich, but the middle class was poor and the poor were third world country poor. I said, 'This can't be America. This can't be America.' As I was driving, I had this open-eye vision. I could see it all as I was driving around, and I could look at the city and see what happened. And the Lord said, 'Look, open your eyes.' I said, 'Lord, this is hard.' And I drove for about five miles in an open-eyed vision driving all the way down the road. I could see the whole thing panning out on the city. I could see the people begging for food. Things happen and it's hard. But I see these things. I said, 'When? When?' He said, 'You will not change this. It's coming, but I'm delaying it for you. A great shaking to awaken will come out of hard times. A great revival will come out of pressure. Great revival will come. I've seen the virus. I've seen these things. And that's why I keep praying into it. That's why I'm here to pray with y'all. I tell you about Penn. I tell you about King James, football, and corruption in baseball and the NFL with major sporting events. I didn't know what I was seeing, but I saw the pray for Bondi and the Lord said there's more. Pray for Giuliani. Pray for Alex Jones. Pray for the Supreme Court judges. Pray for these people. Pray for Donald Jr. Pray for Eric. Pray for Kai. Pray for these people, for they have a hit list. Charlie Kirk was one. This is bigger than what people realize and how much corruption there truly is. And that's why we pray for our beautiful nation that we stay strong and that we don't turn on each other and act stupid. It's a reprobate mind because people don't think right because there's a demonic influence. We don't wrestle against personalities. We wrestle against principalities who work through personalities. So we pray for people. I've said all that to say this. I'm probably now well over an hour. But I'm glad you all show up every night and you want to pray with us. But this video will go up and go on our regular feed. I made that little bit right there for the people who don't like to pray because they need to know what's coming regardless. That's just out of compassion for folks that we need to wake up and know that Jesus Christ is coming. And many of you all are not ready for his return. You're lukewarm. Your hearts aren't ready. I talked to a lot of people and most of the people are not ready for what's coming. Jesus is coming and I yell on the mountaintops to tell you that you need to repent and get your heart right before him because you're running out of time. The ark door's closing. You said, 'What does that mean?' As in the days of Noah, so will it be when the Son of Man returns. A great deception's coming with alien stuff. We're talking major stuff still coming that'll be fallen angel stuff that's going to scare the poo out of a lot of people because men's hearts will fail them for fear looking after those things that are coming on the earth. It's not just about asteroids, folks. It's not just about earthquakes. We're talking about great deceptions. They look like Draconian people. Demonic, I said, the lizard people. There are lizard people on these continents. There's lizard stuff going on. And people go, 'Brandon, you are way out there.' I'm just telling you what I saw. And they try to protect the bloodline of this stuff. And I saw it in the spirit realm. And the Lord said, 'Watch the walls of the temples from Egypt to the paintings in the caves in America, and from the Native Americans to the Aztec and the Incans and all of the ancient writing, the ancient stuff. Look at the walls.' He said they were trying to communicate to you. Bird people, things like that, giants in the land. You don't understand. That's what he said. He said as in the days of Noah, 'Brandon, this scripture, that verse has a lot more. It's like an onion with layers. Remember that. It's an onion with layers. As in the days of Noah.' What is the Lord saying? Jesus said that in Matthew 24. What was he saying? What was he warning about? What are we about to see? Fearful sights you will see that will bring you to your knees. The Lord said that for the powers of heaven will be shaken. I said, 'Lord, what is it?' 'My people must know the word. My people must know how to pray. Go on YouTube and teach my people to pray, for many of them do not know how.' And that's why we're here. Raise up a million men and women prayer army and bring them on YouTube and tell them that I'm coming. Tell them I'm coming. I said, 'Lord, they know you're coming.' 'No, they don't know I'm coming. Their heads are in the sand. Their hearts are cold towards me. They have stiff necks towards me, son. Go and tell them I'm coming and they need to repent.' I said, 'I'll do my best.' He said, 'I've not called you to say the easy things. I call you to say the hard things. You won't be a tickling ear. You won't be the one that brings honey. You're going to tell them the bitter things. You're going to tell them what I'm telling you by the spirit of God because there's not many that will say what you're going to say, but you'll say it with boldness and I'll protect you.' He said, 'Okay, you'll say it with boldness and I will protect you. I'll put a wall of protection around you and your family. Say what I tell you to say and I'll make you accurate. You do what I tell you to do.' I said, 'I'll do it.' Be a Jeremiah in this generation. What does that mean? It's heavy for us. But we do what God's told us to do.
